name: @darksol/terminal
description: DARKSOL Terminal — unified crypto CLI for trading, Wiretap/AIM messaging, agent tooling, x402 payments, market intel, wallets, oracle, cards, and more.

scripts.secret-scan: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),cp=require('child_process'),os=require('os'),path=require('path');const p=path.join(os.homedir(),'.git-hooks','secret-scan.js');if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.log('secret scan unavailable; skipping local hook');process.exit(0)}const r=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,[p,'npm'],{stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(r.status||0)"
scripts.release:check: npm test && npm run audit && npm run packcheck && npm run secret-scan
scripts.postinstall:
echo "
🌑 DARKSOL Terminal installed. Run 'darksol setup' to configure your AI provider.
"

author: DARKSOL <chris00claw@gmail.com>
